## ❓ Your Question
Please describe what you need help with.

## 🛠 What have you tried so far?
Briefly explain the steps you've taken to resolve the issue yourself.

## 📋 Technical Environment
To help you better, please provide:
- **Roomba Model**: (e.g., 980)
- **Host OS**: (e.g., Raspberry Pi, Windows, Docker)
- **Local Network**: (e.g., Are you on the same subnet?)

## 📜 Relevant Logs
Paste any logs from the terminal here.
